info.title: Insurance Management System API
info.description: Insurance management system with multi-tenant support and role-based access control.

get.description:
List users in the current user's company.

Accessible to users with IAM_MAN_ROL or IAM_ASG_PER.

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Users  Get

post.description:
Create a new user in the current user's company.

Accessible to users with IAM_MAN_ROL or IAM_ASG_PER.

get.description:
Get a single user by id within the same company.

Accessible to users with IAM_MAN_ROL or IAM_ASG_PER.

patch.description:
Update a user's role (and therefore their permissions).

Accessible to users with IAM_MAN_ROL or IAM_ASG_PER.

get.description:
Return all roles (except SUPER_ADMIN) and permissions (except SYS_ON_COM).

Accessible only to IAM_MAN_ROL and IAM_ASG_PER.
Roles are limited to the current company or global roles, excluding SUPER_ADMIN.

schema.title: Response List Companies Endpoint Api V1 Companies Get

get.summary: List units, filtered by branch_id or company_id

schema.title: Response List Units Endpoint Api V1 Units Get

Attach a document to a policy request

post.summary: Approve or reject a policy request / quotation

get.summary: Get approval history for a policy request

schema.title: Response List Approvals Endpoint Api V1 Policy Requests  Pr Id  Approval Get

post.summary: Upload a proforma or tax invoice

get.summary: List invoices for a policy request

post.summary: Record payment UTR for an invoice
Upload policy soft copy and transition to POLICY_ISSUED_SOFT
Upload policy hard copy and transition to POLICY_ISSUED_HARD

PolicyRequestCreate.title: PolicyRequestCreate
PolicyRequestCreate.description: Start a new policy procurement request.

PolicyRequestUpdate.title: PolicyRequestUpdate
PolicyRequestUpdate.description: Update editable fields of a policy request.

StatusTransitionRequest.title: StatusTransitionRequest
StatusTransitionRequest.description: Explicitly move a policy request to a new status.

UnitUpdate.title: UnitUpdate
UnitUpdate.description: All fields optional – only send what you want to change.

UserCreateIn.title: UserCreateIn
UserCreateIn.description:
Payload for creating a regular user inside a company.

The company is taken from the current user; the caller specifies
which role in that company the new user should have.

UserUpdateRole.title: UserUpdateRole
UserUpdateRole.description: Payload for updating a user's role inside the same company.

app__masters__schemas__UnitCreate.title: UnitCreate
app__masters__schemas__UnitCreate.description: Fields required to create a new unit.
